name: Sea Life Park Hawaii
tagline: Dolphin shows, sea lion encounters, and a huge reef tank right at Makapuu — touristy but the keiki love it.
hours: Daily 10am–4pm; check website for seasonal hours
bestTime: Arrive at opening to catch the first dolphin show with fewer crowds
kamaaina: Kamaaina annual pass is a solid deal if you go more than twice a year
talkStory: Opened in 1964 by oceanographer Taylor 'Tap' Pryor, Sea Life Park was one of the first marine parks in the U.S. and pioneered dolphin research. The park sits at Makapuu Point with dramatic cliff backdrops and was a filming location for 50 First Dates. It is home to the only known 'wholphin' -- a hybrid of a false killer whale and bottlenose dolphin born here in 1985. The walk-through bird aviary with native Hawaiian species is often skipped but included with admission.
